name: Chinese Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg. chicken Ramen noodles, broken up
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan, toast the sesame seeds and slivered almonds over low heat until fragrant.
2. Mix the toasted sesame seeds and almonds with the cabbage, chopped green onions, and broken-up chicken Ramen noodles.
3. In a blender, combine the dressing ingredients: 3 tbsp. white vinegar, 1/2 tsp. vinegar, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 2 tbsp. sugar, 1/2 cup oil, and chicken flavoring from the Ramen noodles.
4. Pour the blended dressing over the cabbage mixture and stir until well combined.
